offset.noCredits: No credit balance in the same currency is available for this invoice.

metadata.title: 1Cati ERP | Real Estate CRM and Site Operations Platform
metadata.description: 1Cati unifies CRM, portfolio, service, finance, documents, compliance and role-based operations in one ERP workspace for Turkish real estate teams.

hero.headline: Run your real estate operation from one ERP center
hero.subheadline: 1Cati connects sales, portfolio, owners, tenants, dues, service, documents, EIDS and reporting in a fast, role-based and auditable workspace.
hero.previewActivityText: CRM, unit matrix, finance and service teams work from the same record.

problems.title: Why real estate management is hard in Turkey
problems.subtitle: The real numbers and processes a property manager faces every day, especially with the 2026 regulations.

leads.title: Leads get lost across messaging apps
leads.desc: A buyer writes on WhatsApp, Instagram and the website at the same time. After 30 minutes, conversion drops by 60%. Without a single CRM, history disappears when staff changes.

admin.title: 30-40% of time goes to manual admin work
admin.desc: Managers spend almost half the day on data entry, payment reconciliation and report preparation, instead of working with clients.

tools.title: 5-7 disconnected tools
tools.desc: CRM, Excel, WhatsApp, email, calendar and cloud drives do not talk to each other. Data gets duplicated and goes stale.

maintenance.title: Repair requests get forgotten in chats
maintenance.desc: An urgent leak and cosmetic maintenance have the same priority. Without before/after photos and history, disputes with owners are inevitable.

compliance.title: Daily rental fines up to ₺1,000,000
compliance.desc: Law 7464, TÜRSAB license, KBS/e-GUEST within 24 hours, non-compliance costs hundreds of thousands of lira.

owners.title: Foreign owners demand transparency
owners.desc: Time zones and language gaps. Owners want photo reports, clear accounting and assurance that their property is safe.

eids.title: EİDS authorization tracking is difficult
eids.desc: Since 15 February 2026 every property listing on Sahibinden/Hepsiemlak requires e-Government authorization. The owner may grant it and later disable the agent.

fraud.title: Fake title deeds and fake listings
fraud.desc: Forged title deeds, fake contracts and unauthorized agents. Foreign buyers are especially targeted, due diligence is a must in every transaction.

permits.title: Residence permit rules have tightened
permits.desc: $200,000 minimum value, SPK-approved appraisal, income/insurance documents and a 25% foreign quota limit in Antalya/Alanya. Every file is different.

solution.title: 1Çatı, the operating system for real estate
solution.subtitle: CRM, listings, transactions, rentals, maintenance requests, documents and compliance in one platform.

items.crm: Single CRM for leads, clients and owners
items.documents: Document archive for title deeds, contracts and DASK
items.roles: Roles: Administration, Responsible Manager, Accounting, Staff, Owner, Tenant. Each role sees only the pages and actions needed for its responsibility.
items.eids: EİDS authorization tracking and expiry reminders
items.offline: Offline request entry and sync for field teams

compliance.title: Designed for Turkey's 2026 rules
compliance.subtitle: EİDS, TÜRSAB, KBS/e-GUEST, foreign buyer restrictions and currency risks. Active workflows and automations pending official API access are clearly separated.

eids.title: EİDS authorization tracking
eids.desc: e-Government authorization document, status and expiry date for every listing. Automatic reminders and link to owner commission agreement.

dueDiligence.title: Title deed & contract due diligence
dueDiligence.desc: Mandatory pre-sale checklist: title deed, DASK, zoning, photos, authorization document. Only a manager can mark 'ready for contract'.

residence.title: Residence / citizenship eligibility guide
residence.desc: Pre-check for the $200,000 threshold, income/insurance and district quota limits. SPK appraisal value is stored on the object card.

tax.title: Multi-currency and tax estimate
tax.desc: Purchase/sale price entered in TRY/EUR/USD. Simple calculator and price history for 5-year capital-gains tax.

shortTerm.title: Automatic KBS/e-GUEST reporting
shortTerm.desc: 24-hour notification deadline for short-term rentals and TÜRSAB license tracking. Full automation will be added once the official API is available.

verification.title: Title deed verification and notary integration
verification.desc: QR/barcode reading and timestamp. Automatic verification will be added once official Title Deed/Notary APIs are opened.

services.title: ERP modules
services.subtitle: Core workspaces that speed up daily work from sales to site operations.

steps.1: Create the lead or owner record
steps.2: Connect portfolio, unit and people data
steps.3: Assign work by role and responsibility
steps.5: Run service, viewing or sales actions
steps.7: Update owner, tenant and management reports

cta.title: Run your real estate operations by the 2026 rules
cta.subtitle: Unify sales, site management, finance, service and compliance teams in one ERP workspace.

footer.description: Real estate sales and management in Turkey; a trusted partner for local and foreign owners.
footer.securityNote: Secure operations platform, WAMOCON GmbH & Ataberk Estate.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Role-aware operation, finance, service, document and reporting screens.

descriptions.admin: Organization administrator for the assigned company only. Manages that company's users, settings, finance, access and audit; has no cross-organization or platform control. Platform super-admin is a separate protected break-glass identity.
descriptions.manager: Responsible site manager. Supervises services, tasks, staff, reservations, communication and daily risks.
descriptions.accountant: Accounting role. Manages fees, payments, collections, deposits, refunds and finance reports.
descriptions.staff: Operational staff role. Accepts assigned jobs, completes tasks and uploads photo/video reports.
descriptions.owner: Owner role. Sees own-unit services, reservations, authorized documents and management communication.
descriptions.tenant: Tenant role. Sees authorized-unit services, reservations, chat, notifications and documents.
descriptions.guest: Guest role. Browses permitted listings and activities, sees a personal wallet, and follows shared reports, calendar, documents and communication. Read-only outside the wallet.
descriptions.service_provider: Vendor role. Sees and updates assigned service tickets and prepares vendor invoices, plus the guest-level activity, wallet, calendar and document surface.
descriptions.child_owner: Guardian-supervised owner sub-account. Sees a limited activity, read-only wallet, reports and calendar surface within the guardian's delegated scope.
descriptions.child_tenant: Guardian-supervised tenant sub-account. Sees a limited activity, read-only wallet, reports and calendar surface within the guardian's delegated scope.
descriptions.child_guest: Guardian-supervised guest sub-account. Sees a limited activity, read-only wallet, reports and calendar surface within the guardian's delegated scope.

login.title: 1Çatı Login
login.subtitle: Client portal for Ataberk Estate customers and staff
login.authNote: Sign in with your email and password. Access profiles are available for controlled local environments.

login.authError: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
login.accessDescription: Choose your access profile to open the role-based workspace.
login.accessUnavailable: Access profile selection is only available in authorized environments.
login.accessError: Access profile sign-in failed. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ataberk Estate and WAMOCON GmbH are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.dataText: We collect contact details, property preferences, documents required for transactions (such as passport copies and TAPU scans), and usage data of the platform.
privacy.useText: Data is used to provide real-estate services, manage properties, comply with Turkish legal requirements, and improve the platform.
privacy.rightsText: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting info@ataberkestate.com.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By accessing the 1Çatı platform you agree to these terms. The platform is provided by WAMOCON GmbH on behalf of Ataberk Estate.
terms.useText: Users must provide accurate information, keep login credentials secure, and use the platform only for lawful real-estate and property-management purposes.
terms.liabilityText: The platform supports decision-making but does not replace legal, tax or investment advice. Ataberk Estate and WAMOCON are not liable for decisions made based on platform data.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact info@ataberkestate.com.

about.title: About Ataberk Estate
about.p1: Ataberk Estate is a real-estate and property-management company serving local and international buyers in Alanya, Antalya and surrounding regions since 2014 with sales, rentals and after-sales services.
about.p2: The 1Çatı platform combines Ataberk Estate's operational experience with WAMOCON GmbH's digital transformation expertise to run every real-estate process under one roof.

reviews.title: Client Reviews
reviews.intro: Product feedback from operations teams and property owners.

0.quote: Customer messages and maintenance requests are now in one place. We move much faster as a team.
0.author: Mehmet Y.

1.quote: As an owner, seeing monthly reports and title-deed status instantly is a huge relief.
1.author: Elena S.

2.quote: We no longer need a separate spreadsheet to track EİDS authorizations.
2.author: Ayşe K.

platformWorkflow.title: ERP workflow view
platformWorkflow.subtitle: The workspace below shows how CRM, unit matrix, service, finance and calendar teams operate from one system of record.

manualPayments.loadErrorBody: No record was changed. Refresh the workspace or try again shortly.
manualPayments.title: Post a received payment
manualPayments.subtitle: Record a payment reported as received against the exact unit and owner account. The entry is posted to a balanced clearing journal and stays unreconciled until a separate bank review confirms it.
manualPayments.liveTruth: Live database record; this is not bank or card-provider confirmation.
manualPayments.demoTruth: Persistent local QA record; no external bank or payment provider is connected.
manualPayments.noteHelp: Explain what was checked and why this payment is being posted. Do not enter card data or passwords.
manualPayments.managerBody: Managers can review manual receipts for their assigned sites, but cannot post or reverse accounting entries. An organization admin or accountant must complete those actions.
manualPayments.saveError: The payment could not be posted. Review the details and retry with the same request.
manualPayments.saveSuccess: Payment posted as manual and unreconciled. The owner statement and finance ledger will refresh.
manualPayments.replaySuccess: The earlier successful payment was returned; no duplicate was created.
manualPayments.reverseError: The reversal could not be completed. Refresh the record before retrying.
manualPayments.reverseSuccess: A counter-entry was posted. The original receipt remains in the audit history.
manualPayments.empty: No manual payments have been recorded in this workspace yet.

ownerFinance.title: My financial statement
ownerFinance.subtitle: See the current dues balance and recorded payment history for every unit you own, in one clear view.
ownerFinance.pollRecovery: While this view is open, it checks the authorized statement API at least every 30 seconds; Refresh checks now.
ownerFinance.sourceNoteLive: This read-only snapshot is calculated server-side from finance records linked to your verified owner-to-unit relationship.
ownerFinance.sourceNoteDemo: Amounts in this role demo are fixed demo records, not data from a live payment provider.
ownerFinance.backgroundRefreshError: The latest refresh could not be completed. Your existing records remain visible; you can try again.
ownerFinance.errorBody: Your records have not changed. Try again in a few seconds, or contact site management if the issue continues.
ownerFinance.noUnitTitle: No verified unit is linked to your profile
ownerFinance.noUnitBody: Your owner profile must be verified against your unit before financial records can be shown. Site management can review this link.
ownerFinance.loadMoreError: More account activity could not be loaded. Try again.
ownerFinance.noEntriesBody: Choose another unit or record type to review the rest of your account history.
ownerFinance.tableCaption: Dues and payment history for your verified units
